subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of the Command which have been sent down in truth from this hallowed and ancient realm, bringing tidings unto mankind [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الامر قد نزلت بالحق من هذا الفضاء المقدس القدیم و یخبر الناس
subcodes.subjects: @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
